source_description: Sanitized JSON group-key consistency rule samples migrated from legacy Reader-Core samples/fixtures/group_consistency/ (6 files; 3 representative cases retained). Each case pairs a single_key_unique rule with a small record set and an expected classification (pass/fail/reject). Exercises the rule engine's validation DSL: distinctness checking, duplicate detection, and unknown-rule-type rejection.
sanitization: All record values are synthetic Greek letters (alpha/beta/gamma/delta). No real device names, no real record IDs. Migrated from clean synthetic samples.

privacy_check.notes: Pure synthetic placeholder data; no real identifiers.
